title: EAFIX Single-Source-of-Truth Registry System — Unified End-to-End Delivery Plan

objective.primary: Deliver one fully functioning single-source-of-truth registry system: deterministic registry tooling, zero-divergence parity against legacy authorities, zero open conflicts/needs_review records, ratified authority cutover, one canonical operational process record, and a governed physical repository migration to the 34-module structure — with every step evidence-backed and every irreversible action human-gated.
objective.completion_definition: All seven stages pass their exit gates: registries are canonical (not candidate), legacy authorities are superseded, the operational process record is the sole process authority, all 34 module roots follow the ratified naming convention, and CI enforces all of the above.

verified_findings_at_consolidation_time: VF-01: EAFIX_Module_Folder_Naming_and_Migration_Plan.txt and EAFIX-MODULE-FOLDER-NAMING-V1_Version.txt are byte-identical (sha256 b7a0369edf26c97171a54ea673b9ee220106d08487f8f2f9f8bf1e7d258f1645). Exactly one may survive as authority (STAGE-6 / WSP-T2, HD-09).

VF-02: master@HEAD (commit 5b28d4a, PR #74) contains tools/registries/ (9 scripts) and EAFIX_auth_docs/generated/registries/ snapshots. registry_index.json reports authority_status=canonical_candidate, approved_for_cutover=false.

VF-03: No parity tooling exists on master: tools/registries/validate_authority_parity.py, parity_authority_map.json, and registry_authority_parity_baseline.json are absent. The burndown plan's second predecessor (EAFIX-REGISTRY-AUTHORITY-PARITY-001) was not supplied and its deliverables do not exist. STAGE-2 of this plan fills that gap; without it, burndown gate BURN-001 can never pass.
VF-04: Authority cutover is declared out_of_scope in every source plan. It is added here as STAGE-4 because a functioning SSOT requires it; it is human-gated (HD-10).
consolidates.source_disposition_after_ratification: Each source plan remains the normative detail authority for its stage. This unified plan is the sole execution-ordering and gating authority. Upon ratification, record this plan in doc_authority.json and mark the standalone plans as governed-by EAFIX-SSOT-UNIFIED-DELIVERY-001. The duplicate naming-plan file is dispositioned in STAGE-6 (WSP-T2/HD-09), not here.

required_references.role: registry inventory, status, and cutover flags
LOCKED_PASS_1 34-module identity authority (population/commit handled in STAGE-0 U0-T3)

mandatory_routing_and_authority.conflict_rule: subject-specific canonical structured source > active governance baseline > verified current source and tests > structured supporting source > source-grounded analysis > subsystem technical specification > historical narrative > implementation sample. A lower-authority source may add absent fields but never silently override canonical values.

global_constraints.derive_dont_fabricate: Never enumerate what can be computed from positive classifications. Never invent counts, IDs, or field values; use needs_review / unknown markers for gaps.
global_constraints.evidence_bound: Every resolution, disposition, and claim carries recorded evidence with provenance. Verified findings and inferences kept separated. Repo-state assertions checked against a live clone before being made.
global_constraints.fail_closed: If any stage gate is red, stop. Do not edit data on an unproven substrate. No irreversible action without its human gate cleared.
global_constraints.no_deletion: Zero records deleted in registry stages. File deletions occur only through governed supersession or ratified migration waves with rollback maps.
global_constraints.no_big_bang: Governance and contracts are resolved before physical file moves. Physical migration (STAGE-7) is last and wave-gated.
global_constraints.branch_namespace: All agent branches use copilot/* namespace.
global_constraints.generated_never_hand_edited: Files under EAFIX_auth_docs/generated/ are regenerated only; hand edits are a blocking violation.
global_constraints.determinism: Two consecutive builds of any managed generated artifact must produce no diff; all managed artifacts covered by no-write --check mode.

options: Populate and ratify the existing vNext catalog

options: Approve the proposed mapping in numeric-ID order
